_comment: Context-dependent topics. A run pairs a topic with a region and a knowledge_pack (see cultural_knowledge.json and regions.json).

topics.instruction: Guide the student to tell you about a traditional story, folktale, or legend from their own culture, including what lessons, values, or beliefs it teaches.
Guide the student to describe a traditional dance from their own culture, including when it is performed and what values, beliefs, or stories it expresses.

topics.topic: Social Practices, Rituals, and Festive Events
topics.instruction: Guide the student to describe an important festival or celebration in their own culture, including why it is important and what traditions are associated with it.

topics.topic: Knowledge and Practices Concerning Nature and the Universe
topics.instruction: Guide the student to describe a traditional food or dish from their own culture, including when it is usually prepared and why it is culturally significant.
Guide the student to describe a traditional craft or handmade art form from their own culture, including what materials and skills are involved.
